description: Migrate HelloWorld content to dedicated page component

userStories.title: Create HelloWorld page component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extract the HelloWorld content into a dedicated page component at src/pages/HelloWorld.jsx.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/pages/HelloWorld.jsx with functional React component
Component returns div with inline styles: textAlign: 'center', padding: '20px'
Div contains h1 element with text 'Hello, World!'
Div contains p element with text 'This is the original scaffold content.'
